chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-597 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 4590/24 3.For orders on CMA 4593/24 4.For hearing of main case 16-04-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 16.05.2024. Even thereafter, no efforts were made to proceed with the matter. Result thereof, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
